name: v1alpha1ApplicationSetApplicationStatus
description: v1alpha1ApplicationSetApplicationStatus schema from Argo CD API

application.name: Application contains the name of the Application resource

message.name: Message contains human-readable message indicating details about the status

status.name: Status contains the AppSet's perceived status of the managed Application resource

step.name: Step tracks which step this Application should be updated in

targetrevisions.description: TargetRevision tracks the desired revisions the Application should be synced to.
